title: stellularia media var. calycina
intro: Stellularia media var. calycina, also known as the "Calycina Stellularia" or "Calycina Stellaria", is a variant of the Stellularia media plant, a flowering plant species in the primrose family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stellularia media var. calycina include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Stellularia media var. calycina can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues and skin conditions.
